issues.detail: The skill covers only happy path scenarios and lacks error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: setup-letsencrypt-dns01-wildcard
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response A omits the 15‑day renewBefore, the ECDSA private key specification, and the api.example.com host in the Ingress.

scenarios.name: manual-renewal-and-status-check
scenarios.rationale: Response A includes both required cmctl commands, while Response B does not include either of them.
